title: linum medium subsp. texanum
intro: Linum medium subsp. texanum, also known as Texas flax or prairie flax, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Linaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Linum medium subsp. texanum include soothing skin irritations, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
